title: AP 1st 2nd Year Result Out LIVE: BIEAP 1st, 2nd year results declared, 77% pass 1st year, 81% pass 2nd year
description: AP 1st 2nd Year Result Out LIVE: BIEAP 1st and 2nd year results has been declared today, April 15. The direct link to check the results is given here. Follow the blog for latest updates on results, direct link, how to check and more.
